name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: This tunnel leads NORTH toward an area with a flickering force field, or WEST back to the junction.
Go NORTH to find a weakened force field that can be passed through safely - unlike the deadly ones elsewhere.
notes: Tunnel connecting room 6 (west, junction) to room 9 (north, flickering force field). Key route to reach the lifeboat hangar area.
